scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/calculator-core.test.mjs tests/numerology-engine.test.mjs tests/numerology-storage.test.mjs tests/kangjie-core.test.mjs tests/kangjie-domain.test.mjs tests/stroke-provider.test.mjs tests/iching-text.test.mjs tests/site-services.test.mjs tests/rendered-html.test.mjs tests/static-site.test.mjs
scripts.typecheck:contracts: tsc --noEmit --strict --skipLibCheck --module preserve --moduleResolution bundler --target ES2022 calculator-core.d.ts kangjie-core.d.ts domain/numerology/index.d.ts application/numerology-analysis.d.ts infrastructure/numerology-storage.d.ts
